description: Auth setup wizard fix + Prisma enum generator - database/config files below noise threshold
rationale: Call-graph analysis: setup-view.tsx, schema.prisma, package.json, and yarn.lock have no function call relationships connecting them. Multiple disconnected files with no call-graph connectivity = 3+ components = ERROR.
notes: Under domain-based classification, noise threshold filtered small changes leaving 1 domain. Under call-graph connectivity, these files are independent with no import/call relationships, forming multiple disconnected components.
